linux.before: (add-apt-repository -L | grep 'videolan/master-daily') || (sudo add-apt-repository --yes -P ppa:videolan/master-daily && sudo apt update)

linux.notes: client with screen and audio share

linux.before: [ -s /etc/apt/sources.list.d/brave-browser-release.list ] || (sudo curl -fsSLo /usr/share/keyrings/brave-browser-archive-keyring.gpg https://brave-browser-apt-release.s3.brave.com/brave-browser-archive-keyring.gpg && echo 'deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/brave-browser-archive-keyring.gpg] https://brave-browser-apt-release.s3.brave.com/ stable main'| sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/brave-browser-release.list && sudo apt update)

linux.notwhen: ((apt show urserver 2>/dev/null | grep 'Status: install ok installed')

linux.before: [ -s /etc/apt/sources.list.d/spotify.list ] || (curl -sS https://download.spotify.com/debian/pubkey_6224F9941A8AA6D1.gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor --yes -o /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/spotify.gpg && echo 'deb http://repository.spotify.com stable non-free' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/spotify.list && sudo apt update)
(add-apt-repository -L | grep 'obsproject/obs-studio') || (sudo add-apt-repository --yes -P ppa:obsproject/obs-studio  && sudo apt update)

linux.sh: curl -sSL "https://github.com/0x192/universal-android-debloater/releases/download/${uad_version}/uad_gui-linux.tar.gz" | tar -xzvf - && sudo chmod +rx ./uad_gui-linux && sudo chown root ./uad_gui-linux && sudo mv ./uad_gui-linux /usr/bin/uad
